title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
